name: ☥ twisted glisten ☥
description:
Tch, I'm perfect! I can survive on my own.

~ Please... Is anyone there? ~

Hello everyone! Sorry I haven't been making anything for all of y'all recently, but here's Joy- I mean Glisten. This is a complete coincidence, but as of now it's Glisten day in Dandy's World haha... Anyway, take this as a peace offering and don't sacrifice me to the council please.

I'M SORRY I HAVEN'T FED Y'ALL I'VE BEEN BUSY BUT AT LEAST I HAVE EVERY TOON (including mains) IN DANDY'S WORLD NOW YIPPEE
creator: ~_astro_~
